reviews.review_title: Saying to update when there's no update
reviews.review_description: When I just to got this game it telling that I have to update cuz I'm on a older version and theres literally no updates so I restart my headset and when I got on Capuchin og again and it's telling me to update when there's literally no updates I did the same thing again, and guess what it's telling me to update WHEN THERE'S LITERALLY NO UPDATES TO UPDATE THIS GAME, this is why I'm rating this game a 1 star
i can't join any public lobbies only it says and i cannot play any i just like download the game and i can't even like play it
Gam sas to update butt know updae

I got banned by some mod named "cosmo" and another guy (he was grey) due to being a witness, and I'm not even sure what I witnessed! Good game, bad mods. Also 3 other reviews are mentioning horrible mods so... find another copy PLEASE. (The reason I have this at 5 stars is because I want everybody to see this) edit: capuchin v1 seems like a better copy due to the mods just being chill
Everytime I log in it says you are on a older version please update, while I’m on the recent update and you can’t update it, there’s only live version on the channels, but you need to fix this.

Idk if the game has been shutdown by the original devs of capuchin, but if not, why doesn't work? Everyone you ask that plays capuchin or has played capuchin will tell you that old capuchin is better, do why do you fail to provide what we want?
